broadcast.text: JSN AND Pickens?! That's the most explosive WR room this league has ever seen. Running backs are a social construct. Genius operates on its own timeline.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Pickens to D1LLIGAF at twenty. Two wideouts, zero running backs, and a man who once benched his kicker for attitude problems. The board will punish this or crown it - no in-between.
broadcast.speaker: anchor

broadcast.text: On the clock already?! The draft gods put the franchise at five on purpose. Whoever he takes, it's the steal of the round - write it down.
broadcast.speaker: homer

broadcast.text: Four picks in and the top shelf is already bare - Chase off at four means somebody in this lobby reads a ranking sheet. Now D1LLIGAF is on the clock at five, and history says buckle up.
broadcast.speaker: anchor
